rulings.Case Title: DFI FUNDING, INC VS. MARIA DE JESUS SOSA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 5, 2014, line 5. DEFENDANT MARIA DE JESUS SOSA's AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT The Court treats Defendant's motion as a motion for judgment on the pleadings. Motion for judgment on the pleadings is granted for Plaintiff to amend the complaint to address the issue of standing to bring this action. Motion is otherwise denied, there is no requirement in California to record an assignment of Deed of Trust prior to foreclosure sale. Calvo v. HSBC (2011) 130 Cal.App.4th 118. Trail date of December 8, 2014 is vacated as the action is not at issue. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YUE YUE, LLC, VS. ALLISON LEIGH JONES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, December 5, 2014, line 6. DEFENDANT ALLISON JONES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend to (1) correct the alleged typo re: defendants' failure to cure; and (2) to attach the "letter" referenced in the lease or address the lack of such letter and to allege the amount rent for the premises. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Proof of Service is sufficient. = (501/REQ)
